content.en:
When the Wolf Bone Holy Beast and the Violent Ape Holy Beast mentioned the Origin Rule Robbery Crystal, Ye Tian asked curiously, "What exactly is the Origin Rule Robbery Crystal, and what is the use?"

The Wolf Bone Holy Beast explained: "The Origin Rule Tribulation Crystal is a treasure that can only be born when one side of the Heaven and Earth Tribulation is a great tribulation, it is very rare and rare, it can help a top Holy Beast to comprehend the rules of one side of the Heaven and Earth faster, otherwise, we can only stay in the Exotic Heaven and Earth for a short time, where can we create a holy law that fits the Exotic Heaven and Earth? Time is simply too late, only by obtaining the Origin Rule Tribulation Crystal, can we hope to achieve the strongest Holy Beast......"

Speaking of this, he glanced at the Heyuan Holy Beast curiously, revealing a curious look, and the Violent Ape Holy Beast was also curious.

Ye Tian didn't know the Origin Rule Treasure Crystal, how did he break through to the Supreme Holy Beast?

Before, the two of them had always thought that Ye Tian had been lucky enough to obtain an Origin Rule Tribulation Crystal during the last Dark Forbidden Tribulation, and they had been secretly comprehending the rules of the Dark Forbidden Domain for such a long time, creating a holy law that fit the Dark Forbidden Domain, so that they could break through to the Supreme Holy Beast Realm.

But at the moment, it doesn't seem to be the case.

For a moment, they were curious.

Ye Tian also knew that the wolf bone holy beast was suspicious, but he didn't care.

His clone is also in the realm of the strongest holy beast, and he is not afraid of the wolf bone holy beast, and they will not do anything to him because of this.

At this time.

Ye Tian also finally understood how the foreign powerhouses broke through, the foreign powerhouses did not have a special copy body like him, they could sneak into the foreign land, and they had been learning the rules in the foreign land.

They can only sneak into the exotic realm to comprehend the rules when they are in the Exotic Tribulation, but the Tribulation will not be too long, and in such a short time, no matter how demonic the talent is, there is no way to comprehend the rules of the Exotic Land!

And once you leave the foreign land and return to your own world, there is no hope of creating a holy law or ancestral law that is suitable for the foreign land, and so on.

But if you get an Origin Rule Heist Crystal, even if you leave the foreign land, you can always understand the rules of the foreign land.

"In this way, if you get an Origin Rule Tribulation Crystal from an Exotic Realm, even if you don't enter a Exotic Realm, you still have the hope of becoming a Supreme Holy Beast?"

Ye Tian asked.

"Yes!"

The Wolf Bone Sacred Beast nodded.

At this time, Ye Tian was a little moved by the Exotic Origin Rule Tribulation Crystal, if he got the Exotic Origin Rule Tribulation Crystal, he could bring it back to the human race, and give it to his relatives, so that they could comprehend the Exotic Origin Rule Tribulation Crystal, and the day when they could understand it thoroughly, they would enter the realm of the strongest ancestor.

"The Exotic Origin Rule Raid Crystal is also useful to our Supreme Holy Beast, right?"

Ye Tian asked again.

"Of course it works!" the Wolf Bone Sacred Beast said with a smile, "Our goal is to become a second-level Supreme Sacred Beast, so we must create an Ultimate Holy Technique that conforms to the rules of the Exotic Land, and then fuse the two Ultimate Holy Techniques to break the shackles and comprehend a Supreme Holy Technique." Therefore, the Exotic Origin Rule Raid Crystal is still of great help to us. Moreover, the Exotic Origin Rule Raid Crystal can also greatly improve our cultivation, as long as we don't completely refine the Exotic Origin Rule Raid Crystal, it can also be slowly restored. Therefore, one Exotic Origin Rule Tribulation Crystal was enough to make the strongest holy beasts fight. Under normal circumstances, the number of Origin Rule Tribulation Crystals born from a Great Tribulation is uncertain, and there may be only a few or dozens of them. There is evidence that the more kills, the more Origin Rules will eventually rob the crystals. "

"The more kills, the more Origin Rule Tribulation Crystals will be?" Ye Tian frowned, realizing what this meant, "So, this is also the reason why every Great Tribulation, those foreign forces are killing like crazy and destroying everything?"

"Yes!"

The wolf bone holy beast nodded, and then said: "Except for our three holy sects, other forces can't survive at all, after the catastrophe, the entire heaven and earth are afraid that only the territory of our three holy lands still has some living beings, and other areas are afraid that they will be almost annihilated." When the catastrophe passes, some creatures and worlds will slowly be born in those areas. "

Ye Tian completely understood at this moment.

The Dark Forbidden Realm was born one after another, the Dark Destruction Domain, the Dark Sacred Domain, and the Dark Soul Domain...... These dark sanctuaries were born, one dark sanctuary was born in each dark calendar, and nine dark sanctuaries were born in nine dark calendars.

Then why is the dark holy land where the previous three tribulations were born gone, and not even any ruins and the world before the tribulation?

Now, he knew that the former Dark Holy Land and many worlds had all been destroyed by foreign powerhouses.

After the Great Tribulation, the Dark Forbidden Realm became an empty heaven and earth, and then re-conceived.

The Holy Domain Heaven and Earth can at least protect the three major Holy Sects, but there was no Supreme Ancestor before the Dark Forbidden Domain, so it is impossible to keep any place, those top Ancestors are trying to hide, where will they protect those Dark Holy Lands!

"It's no wonder that those ancient ancestors were not keen on occupying the Dark Holy Land and didn't want to develop their power, so they were all in vain, and if they developed, they would be destroyed by the powerhouses of foreign lands. "

Ye Tian suddenly realized.

But this time it's different, with him guarding the dark forbidden area, at least he can keep the territory of the human race.

Ye Tian chatted with the two supreme holy beasts for a long time.

Soon, the catastrophe of the Holy Land Heaven and Earth arrived.

Buzz Buzz!!

The rules of the entire Sanctuary Heaven and Earth have changed slightly, and the Heaven and Earth are filled with the aura of killing, and they no longer suppress the powerhouses of the Outer Land.

I saw that all the forbidden places in the Holy Land Heaven and Earth, one after another, figures walked out of the forbidden places, and the weakest ones were comparable to ordinary ancestors.

As for the strong under the ancestors, there is no need to come, they can't even cross the distance of one side of heaven and earth, and they are too weak to even be cannon fodder.

Meanwhile.

In the area around the Sea and Sky Holy Sect, countless strong people gathered to seek the protection of the Sea and Sky Holy Sect, and as for those who were weak, they couldn't take care of it.

Countless powerhouses crossed the Sacred Realm Heaven and Earth, and the endless creatures turned into ashes in an instant.

Countless resources were taken away by them, and they became the energy for the foreign powerhouses to become stronger.

Dark Forbidden Realm.

Ye Tian got in touch with the doppelganger Heyuan Holy Beast, and knew that the catastrophe of the Holy Realm Heaven and Earth was coming, so he separated a copy body.

However, it takes a little time for the copy body of the Supreme Ancestor level to condense it, and it also requires a lot of ability, which is obviously a limitation.

Soon, this replica body was condensed, and it was the same as the combat power of the main body.

"Go ahead!"

The copied body crossed over to the Sea and Sky Forbidden Land, and easily killed all the alien beasts in the Sea and Sky Forbidden Land.

He wants to pass through the door, enter the Holy Realm, and take the opportunity to occupy the Haitian Holy Sect.
